problem.title: Most calorie apps tell you how much. We tell you what it does to your body.
problem.body: Two meals can have identical calories and wildly different effects on your energy and blood sugar. Glycemic load captures that difference — so you finally understand why some meals leave you steady and others leave you crashing.

waysToLog.title: Three ways to log, all in seconds
waysToLog.subtitle: Whatever's on your plate, capture it fast and get instant glycemic-load insight.

items.title: Plain-language search
items.body: Type “two eggs and toast” the way you'd say it. We handle the rest.

items.body: Snap your plate. Our AI identifies foods and estimates portions instantly.

items.title: Barcode scanner

about.title: Nutrition, made data-driven and understandable
about.intro: NutriGL Insight is built by OUSHEN — the independent studio of developer Anass Mahmoudi — with a single conviction: people deserve to understand their food, not just count it.
story: NutriGL Insight started with a simple frustration. Calorie counters are everywhere, yet they answer the wrong question. Knowing a meal is 500 calories tells you nothing about how it will move your blood sugar, your energy, or your cravings an hour later.

Glycemic load does. It's a well-researched measure of how a food actually affects your blood sugar, accounting for both the quality and quantity of carbohydrates. So we built an app that puts it front and center — paired with fast logging, honest data, and insight anyone can act on.
As an independent developer, Anass ships thoughtfully and listens closely. Every release is shaped by real user feedback, and the roadmap is driven by what genuinely helps people eat better.

values.title: Precision
values.body: Accurate nutrition and glycemic-load data you can trust to make real decisions.

values.title: Health
values.body: Tools that support steady energy and long-term wellbeing, not crash diets.

values.title: Privacy
values.body: Your data is yours. Track on-device if you like, and we never sell your information.

values.title: Continuous improvement
values.body: We ship often and evolve the app around genuine user feedback.

about.contactBody: Questions, feedback, or partnership ideas? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what data NutriGL Insight (“the app”, “we”, “us”) collects, how we use it, and the rights you have. NutriGL Insight is published by OUSHEN (developer: Anass Mahmoudi).
privacy.legalNote: This is a template and should be reviewed by a qualified legal professional before publishing. It is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute legal advice.

sections.title: 1. Data we collect
paragraphs: Account information: If you choose to sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile identifier to create and secure your account. Google sign-in is optional — you can use the app privately on-device without an account.
Food and health logs: The meals, recipes, portions, goals, streaks, and related nutrition data you enter. If you enable cloud sync, this is stored on our servers associated with your account.
Device and technical data: A device identifier, app version, device model, operating system, and language settings, used to operate and secure the service.
Usage and analytics data: Aggregated, privacy-respecting information about how features are used, to improve the app.

Camera and photos: When you use AI photo recognition, the app accesses your camera or a photo you select. The image is processed to identify foods and estimate nutrition. See section 3 for how photos are handled and retained.

sections.title: 2. How we use your data
paragraphs: To provide core features: logging meals, calculating calories, macros, and glycemic load, and generating trends and insights.
To sync your data across your devices when you are signed in.
To maintain security, prevent abuse, diagnose crashes, and improve reliability and performance.

Legal basis (where applicable, e.g. EEA/UK): performance of our contract with you, your consent (e.g. for optional features and analytics), and our legitimate interests in operating and improving the service.

sections.title: 3. AI processing of food descriptions and photos
paragraphs: To recognize foods and estimate nutrition, the app sends your food descriptions and, when you use photo logging, your food images to an AI provider (Google's Gemini) for analysis.

These inputs are used to return nutrition results to you. We do not use your photos to identify you, and we do not sell them. Retention by the AI provider is governed by that provider's terms; we configure the integration to minimize retention where possible.
You can avoid AI photo processing by logging with plain-language search or the barcode scanner instead.

sections.title: 4. Third-party services
paragraphs: We rely on a limited set of trusted providers to run the app: Google Sign-In (authentication), cloud hosting and database (for sync and storage), an AI provider (Google Gemini, for food recognition), analytics, and crash reporting.
Each provider only receives the data necessary to perform its function, and is bound by its own privacy and security commitments. We do not sell your personal data to anyone.

sections.title: 5. Data storage, retention, and security
paragraphs: If you use cloud sync, your data is stored on secured cloud infrastructure and protected with encryption in transit and at rest, along with access controls.
We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service. When you request deletion, we remove your synced data as described in section 6.
No method of transmission or storage is perfectly secure, but we work to protect your information using industry-standard safeguards.

sections.title: 6. Your rights and choices
paragraphs: You can access and correct much of your data directly in the app. Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data, and to object to or restrict certain processing.

Deletion: You can permanently delete your account and synced data at any time using our self-serve Delete My Data page, or by emailing contact@nutriglinsight.com with the subject “Data Deletion Request”.
To exercise any right, contact us at contact@nutriglinsight.com.

sections.title: 7. Children's privacy
paragraphs: NutriGL Insight is not directed to children under the age required by your local law (generally 13, or 16 in parts of the EEA). We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us data, contact us and we will delete it.

sections.title: 8. International data transfers
paragraphs: Your data may be processed in countries other than your own, including where our providers operate. Where required, we use appropriate safeguards (such as standard contractual clauses) to protect your data during these transfers.

sections.title: 9. Cookies and similar technologies
paragraphs: Our website uses only essential storage needed to function and, where enabled, minimal privacy-respecting analytics. If we use non-essential cookies, we will ask for consent via a banner. The mobile app does not use advertising cookies.

sections.title: 10. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We may update this policy from time to time. We will revise the “last updated” date above and, for material changes, provide a more prominent notice.

sections.title: 11. Contact us
paragraphs: For any privacy questions or requests, contact us at contact@nutriglinsight.com. Publisher: OUSHEN. Developer: Anass Mahmoudi.

deleteData.title: Delete My Data
deleteData.intro: Use this page to request permanent deletion of your NutriGL Insight account and the data associated with it. You don't need to be signed in to submit a request.
whatItems: Your synced meals, recipes, and food logs
Your goals, macro targets, and preferences
Your streaks, badges, and progress history
deleteData.warningBody: Deletion is irreversible. Once processed, your data cannot be recovered. Requests are typically completed within 30 days.

form.title: Request deletion
form.emailHelp: The email you used to sign in with Google.
form.supportIdHelp: Find this in the app under Settings → About (Support ID). It's what identifies your record.
reasonOptions: I no longer use the app
form.confirmLabel: I understand this permanently deletes my data and cannot be undone.
form.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
form.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly.
form.successBody: We've received your deletion request and will confirm to your email within 30 days. If you don't hear back, email us at contact@nutriglinsight.com.

deleteData.altBody: You can also email us directly at contact@nutriglinsight.com with the subject “Data Deletion Request”. Include your account email and Support ID so we can find your record.

contact.title: We'd love to hear from you
contact.intro: Questions, feedback, bug reports, or partnership ideas — reach out any time.
contact.responseValue: We usually reply within 2–3 business days.

form.title: Send a message
form.note: This form opens your email app with the details filled in.
